2605.16961.title: Latent Action Control for Reasoning-Guided Unified Image Generation
2605.16961.paper_summary: Unified multimodal models can encode visual understanding and image generation within a shared backbone, yet understanding does not automatically translate into control: models may infer objects, relations, or knowledge cues but fail to instantiate them in the generated image. We propose Latent Action Control (LAC), which makes reasoning actionable by representing it as hidden continuous actions inside a unified generator. Given a prompt, LAC rolls out a role-structured latent trajectory for planning, internal visual drafting, diagnosis, and refinement, and injects these actions into the hidden stream that conditions flow-based generation, without producing reasoning tokens or intermediate images. Since such action trajectories are unobserved, LAC learns them through prior-guided variational latent action alignment from training-only rendered semantic priors, draft image features, and supervised halting signals, followed by Latent-Flow GRPO to align the latent-to-image rollout with terminal visual feedback. This provides a control path from inferred relations, bindings, and knowledge cues to the generation process. Instantiated on BAGEL-7B-MoT, LAC consistently improves compositional and knowledge-grounded generation across GenEval, WISE, and T2I-CompBench, with the largest gains on spatial relations, attribute binding, and world-knowledge-sensitive prompts. Ablations and latent interventions show that the learned action trajectory is consumed by the generator, suggesting that unified generation benefits when understanding is not only encoded, but made actionable during generation.
2605.16961.paper_summary_zh: 統一的多模態模型可以在共享的骨幹中編碼視覺理解和圖像生成，然而理解並不自動轉化為控制：模型可能推斷出物體、關係或知識提示，但未能在生成的圖像中具體化它們。<lb/>我們提出潛在行動控制（Latent Action Control，LAC），通過將推理表示為統一生成器內部的隱藏連續行動，使推理變得可操作。<lb/>給定一個提示，LAC 展開一個角色結構化的潛在軌跡，用於規劃、內部視覺草圖、診斷和改進，並將這些行動注入到條件流生成的隱藏流中，而不產生推理標記或中間圖像。<lb/>由於這樣的行動軌跡是不可觀察的，LAC 通過從僅訓練的語義先驗、草圖圖像特徵和監督停止信號中進行先驗引導的變分潛在行動對齊來學習它們，隨後通過潛在流 GRPO 將潛在到圖像的展開與終端視覺反饋對齊。<lb/>這提供了一條從推斷的關係、綁定和知識提示到生成過程的控制路徑。<lb/>在 BAGEL-7B-MoT 上實現的 LAC 一致地改善了在 GenEval、WISE 和 T2I-CompBench 上的組合和知識基礎生成，在空間關係、屬性綁定和對世界知識敏感的提示上獲得了最大的增益。<lb/>消融和潛在干預顯示學到的行動軌跡被生成器消耗，這表明當理解不僅被編碼，而且在生成過程中變得可操作時，統一生成受益。
2605.16961.author: Fuxiang Zhai et.al.
2605.16961.authors: Fuxiang Zhai, Sixiang Chen, Yingjin Li, Shuaibo Li, Jianyu Lai, Tengjun Huang, Lei Zhu
